---
title: "My Projects"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 3
page-layout: full
---

::: {.content-section}

<span class="section-label">Work</span>

### Featured Projects

<p class="section-subtitle">A selection of projects I've built and contributed to across algorithmic trading, financial data science, machine learning, and NLP.</p>

<div class="project-grid">

::: {.project-card}
<span style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.75rem;display:block;">&#x1F4DD;</span>
<p class="project-title">SisengAI Blog</p>
<p class="project-description">My personal blog covering algorithmic trading, machine learning, and data science topics using Quarto. Hosted on GitHub Pages.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
  <span>Quarto</span>
  <span>Blog</span>
</div>
<a href="https://www.sisengai.com/blog/" target="_blank" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">Visit Blog</a>
:::

::: {.project-card}
<span style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.75rem;display:block;">&#x1F30D;</span>
<p class="project-title">Berom-English Corpus</p>
<p class="project-description">Developing a corpus of contemporary words and sentences for the Berom language, preserving and expanding an under-resourced language.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
  <span>NLP</span>
  <span>Corpus</span>
  <span>African Languages</span>
</div>
<a href="https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1pNDy2Nol-j1bJacxQvrGgwZXwLmo_H5SyZR76jd8LUk/edit?usp=sharing" target="_blank" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">Explore Corpus</a>
:::

::: {.project-card}
<span style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.75rem;display:block;">&#x1F4DC;</span>
<p class="project-title">Low-Resourced Machine Translation</p>
<p class="project-description">Co-authored research on participatory research for low-resourced machine translation, with a case study on African languages.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
  <span>MT</span>
  <span>Research</span>
  <span>African Languages</span>
</div>
<a href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/347235065_Participatory_Research_for_Low-resourced_Machine_Translation_A_Case_Study_in_African_Languages/citations?latestCitations=PB%3A355365230" target="_blank" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">Read Paper</a>
:::

::: {.project-card}
<span style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.75rem;display:block;">&#x1F30D;</span>
<p class="project-title">AfriMTE and AfriCOMET</p>
<p class="project-description">Research exploring how to empower COMET — a machine translation evaluation framework — to embrace African languages.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
  <span>COMET</span>
  <span>Evaluation</span>
  <span>African Languages</span>
</div>
<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.09828" target="_blank" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">Read on Arxiv</a>
:::

::: {.project-card}
<span style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.75rem;display:block;">&#x1F3B5;</span>
<p class="project-title">Spotify Dashboard</p>
<p class="project-description">An interactive dashboard curating hit songs on Spotify, giving a clear overview of trending music across genres and regions.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
  <span>Dashboard</span>
  <span>Spotify</span>
  <span>Data Viz</span>
</div>
<a href="https://www.sisengai.com/spotify-dashboard/dashboard.html" target="_blank" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">View Dashboard</a>
:::

::: {.project-card}
<span style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.75rem;display:block;">&#x1F4CA;</span>
<p class="project-title">Donchian Channel Breakout Dashboard</p>
<p class="project-description">A dashboard visualizing Donchian Breakouts on selected stocks using the Alphavantage API for tracking performance.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
  <span>Trading</span>
  <span>Dashboard</span>
  <span>Alphavantage</span>
</div>
<a href="https://www.sisengai.com/Alphavantage_Dashboard/Alphavantage_Dashboard.html" target="_blank" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">View Dashboard</a>
:::

</div>

:::

---

<p class="section-subtitle" style="text-align:center;">Feel free to reach out through my social handles for inquiries or collaboration.</p>
